description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 디지털 건축이 만나는 플로라-9의 개념적 비전으로, 광합성 회로를 통해 흐르는 생체 발광 데이터 스트림이 특징입니다.
description.en: A conceptual vision of FLORA-9, where organic botany meets digital architecture, featuring bioluminescent data streams flowing through photosynthetic circuits.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro shot of FLORA-9, a cybernetic flower with iridescent translucent petals made of liquid crystal, glowing fiber-optic stamens emitting neon blue particles, digital glitch effects around the edges, integrated circuit patterns on the leaves, dark futuristic laboratory background, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, digital nature aesthetic.
